title: Confirm API Methods and Salesforce Connected App Configuration
description:
Review Salesforce Connected App API access control configuration to confirm that DataTools Pro is using REST APIs (not SOAP) and that the connected app settings align with current best practices.

Reference: [Salesforce Connected Apps API Access Control article](https://doug-merrett.medium.com/salesforce-connected-apps-api-access-control-and-soap-api-login-calls-an-update-b6e377f4c7ac)

### Findings

DataTools Pro does not use SOAP APIs. All Salesforce integrations use REST APIs exclusively.
acceptance_criteria: Salesforce connected app configuration is reviewed against the reference article
Confirmed that DataTools Pro uses REST APIs exclusively, not SOAP
Any configuration gaps are identified and documented
api_changes: Confirmed DataTools Pro uses Salesforce REST APIs exclusively. No SOAP API usage found in the configuration.
implementation_notes: Review confirmed REST-only API usage. No changes required to the Salesforce connected app configuration.
